title: Read, Unread, Star, Tag, Bulk Action, and Conflict Semantics · Guided Systems Studio
summary: A public-interest newsroom incrementally builds consistent personal reader-state model from original RSS, Atom, HTTP, and PostgreSQL fixtures while retaining prior Go, HTTP-client, HTTP-server, SQL, Git, accessibility, security, testing, cancellation, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of consistent personal reader-state model while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, caus…
objectives: Keep read, unread, starred, hidden, saved, and tag relationships scoped to principal, tenant, and entry without mutating shared content.
Make set-state commands idempotent with explicit desired state, preconditions where needed, and stable response semantics.
Define bounded all-or-nothing or per-item bulk semantics, authorization, result reconciliation, and retry behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Go Personal State Ownership
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go team handles case 6368 during a cross-tenant privacy audit. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove private reader state, desired-state commands, bulk semantics, conflicts, and count repair; publisher fetch and retention budgets must remain explicit; then change one schema, constraint, transaction, upsert, migration, query, or search plan and preserve admitted state. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Go Personal State Ownership.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for keep read, unread, starred, hidden, saved, and tag relationships scoped to principal, tenant, and entry without mutating shared content. For Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Go Personal State Ownership, keep Feed Go Personal State Ownership connected to executable Go feed, XML, HTTP, PostgreSQL, schedule, API, reader, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
